findings.issue: grep pattern is overly broad and will match unintended files across the codebase
findings.suggestion: Replace with specific path pattern like 'grep -E "src/agents/.*\.js$"' to constrain matches
findings.est_impact: Reduces false positives in file searches and improves scanning accuracy

findings.issue: Multiple localhost:3000 endpoints hardcoded with no environment variable abstraction
findings.suggestion: Extract to environment variables (e.g., AGENT_BASE_URL) to support different environments
findings.est_impact: Improves configuration portability and reduces manual edits for environment changes
